privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new user account in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The required user details are: Username 'analyst01', Full Name 'Security Analyst', Email 'analyst01@company.local', and Role 'Operator'. These values are confirmed by the task description and the setup script instructions.
